chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 77 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 11.01.2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwri, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that although he has filed a statement dated 18.12.2023 for withdrawing the petition, but under the instructions of petitioner, he is not pressing the same. He has filed a statement stating that although the petitioner’s service has been regularized, but with effect from the date of his joining vide order dated 20.03.2023, for which he has filed the petition. Whereas he was appointed in the year 2012 and is to be confirmed in the service from such period. He further submits that he had preferred an appeal before respondent No.3 praying for such a relief, which he has accepted and has recommended his case vide letter dated 23.06.2023 to respondent No.5 for consideration. Learned Counsel submits that he would be satisfied if respondent No.5 is directed to consider petitioner’s case, in accordance with law, within a certain period in the light of recommendations in the above said letter. Learned Assistant Attorney General has extended his no objection to the above proposition. Accordingly, respondent No.5 is directed to consider case of the petitioner within two months, in accordance with law, in terms of letter dated 23.06.2023, issued by respondent No.3, for the purpose of issuing revised appointment / regularization memo of petitioner.

Learned Assistant Attorney General has extended his no objection to the above proposition. Accordingly, respondent No.5 is directed to consider case of the petitioner within two months, in accordance with law, in terms of letter dated 23.06.2023, issued by respondent No.3, for the purpose of issuing revised appointment / regularization memo of petitioner. The petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
